title: Expand groups on Kanban boards to show all items
excerpt: Expand groups on Kanban boards to show all items. The small scroll window in each column is incredibly annoying. Just let the group’s height expand to fit all of the cards in the columns.

posts.author: steven.glickman (Steven Glickman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Expand groups on Kanban boards to show all items. The small scroll window in each column is incredibly annoying. Just let the group’s height expand to fit all of the cards in the columns.

image1496×978 54.6 KB

posts.author: conjuredmedia (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: YESSS This would be AMAZING! No idea why this isn’t a thing? Either manually adjust the height as desired or auto, or a toggle for it.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @huwrc ,

You can try out our app Multi Board Kanban. You can group Kanban using

  • Status Columns

  • People Columns

  • Dropdown Columns

  • Group

You can use this for a single board as a Board view or for multiple boards as a Dashboard Widget. Additionally, you can also see sub items of a board as separate draggable cards.

You also have the provision to adjust the height and width of the columns and swimlanes

image1531×856 76.7 KB

image1523×863 77 KB

Is this what you had in mind?
